subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth the Creator of the worlds and is worthy of the Provider of nations, Who, through His consummate wisdom, hath bestowed upon every soul a gift [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خلاق عالم را سزا و رزاق امم را لایق که بحکمت بالغه هر کسی را عطائی بخشید
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
